title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) is an open source framework for building stateless, event-driven long-running AI agents. It demonstrates a multi-agent pattern where a coordinator agent delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents while maintaining clean reasoning chains.
writeup: This video covers Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for building stateless, event-driven long-running AI agents. It demonstrates a multi-agent pattern in which a coordinator agent delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents while keeping reasoning chains clean. The takeaways center on the stateless, event-driven design and the coordinator-to-sub-agent delegation structure for handling long-running work.
